calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John J. Murray, Esq., 495-0880, for defendant Caryn Moore moving to set aside default/default judgment
Steven A. Booska, Esq., 397-4345, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT CARYN MOORE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND -- Granted -- answer to be filed within 10 days. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JLW/301/NL-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton CSR #1558

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On June 5, 2003
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Appearances:
Linda Hetland, Esq. for Plaintiff Allstate Insurance Co.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the Defendant Caryn Moore as follows:
Principal of $40,575.79
Costs of $299.00
For the total of $40,874.79
Judgment signed in open court.
